area_anchor: Brikette — Staff get no feedback when saves partially fail and email validation is too basic
current_truth: When a draft save succeeds but the subsequent refresh fails, staff see stale data with no explanation. Email recipient validation only runs on save (not on blur) and uses a simplistic regex that accepts clearly invalid addresses.
next_scope_now: Add separate error handling for save vs refresh failures with appropriate feedback, add onBlur email validation, and improve the email regex.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: no feedback on partial save success; no blur validation; simplistic email regex
why: When staff save a draft edit, it sometimes saves successfully but the screen doesn't update — so staff think it didn't work and try again. Email addresses are only checked when you press Save, not as you type, so invalid addresses aren't flagged early. The email checker also accepts obviously wrong addresses. Better feedback and validation helps staff work confidently.

intended_outcome.statement: Save and refresh failures show distinct feedback, email validation runs on blur with improved regex, and partial success is communicated clearly.
